text.message: This should be a fun one! Everyone gonna have to trade
Obviously would normally catch that but that’s just r a t t y
And how exactly will you do that without producing wheat
what would you give to not plough u oj
now u just owe me 1, i didnt give u 1 so
Don't htink thats how it works
he made an honest mistake there
he would have settled and wouldn't have been in this situation if you didn't lie earlier
Oh yeah green isn’t getting a thing from me
because you are in the lead
He’s not gonna block himself bud
You want me to block myself?
at least don't lie if your gonna complain about being soloed lol
Green just expect that I solo you every chance I have
red block blue he wins with one knight
oj seems to be upset that i stole his wehat
at the cost of the game
green ahead now. He gets road and army
I need the ore to pop oj
I can give you in the future, or help you take road
i'm gonna join the nonbind feast, sorry oj
need my mats to build to 10
This is the least honorable group ever
thats also what you get for extorting so much
How desperate are you to make these trades red?
then you guys should trade me
i'm building to 10. red realizes i'm not leader
how would i give you wheat
Red build a road so blue can’t take road
gonna need a road to do that
guys, i'm not going for road, i'm building to 10
You will settle and take road
green, i would have traded you that
how many vps do you have red?
also watch out guys, 2nd mono is out there
Green what do you need to extend? Will give
I mean I’ll play my night this next turn
Crazy you don’t see blues ability to win this game with 2 rolls
But makes sense given your game and setup red
In return to non binding ill do it as you wish :)
